name: George Frazier
abstract: George Francis Frazier Jr. (June 10, 1911 – June 13, 1974) was an American journalist.

about_quotes.speaker: Buddy Tate
about_quotes.evidence: when I first joined the band once... His name was George Frazier... I could see George because he was sitting right in front.

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy McPartland
about_quotes.evidence: It's like the article you were reading by George Frazier before... And I'm glad that he wrote that

about_quotes.speaker: Teddy Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: Some of the writers, I remember, George Frazier busted into the jazz world years ago...

about_quotes.speaker: Hentoff Nat
about_quotes.evidence: he invited me up to the studio, and we got to know each other.
about_quotes.doc_title: Hentoff Nat — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
